title: Shelly's Ocean Journey
subtitle: A Tale of Discovery and Wonder
story_outline: Introduction: Shelly is born on a warm beach
Rising action: Shelly's first glimpse of the ocean
Climax: Shelly braves the waves to begin her journey
Resolution: Shelly discovers her home in the reef

story_text.page_1: Once upon a time, on a warm sandy beach...
story_text.page_2: Shelly the sea turtle hatched from her egg...

character_descriptions.Shelly: A brave young sea turtle with a curious spirit. Soft shell, warm brown eyes with bright highlights.
character_descriptions.Ocean: Personified as a gentle, welcoming guide. Blue and green tones, flowing form.

art_prompts.page_1: A baby sea turtle hatching from sand on a peaceful beach at sunrise
art_prompts.page_2: Shelly the sea turtle looking out at the vast ocean, amazed and excited
